evals.prompt: Review this local branch diff before merge and tell me whether it is safe.
evals.expected_output: Inspects the diff and surrounding code, runs relevant checks, leads with actionable findings, and states any skipped gate or residual risk.
assertions: Prioritizes bugs, regressions, security risks, and missing tests over summaries.
Requires dry-run, validation, rollback notes, or owner confirmation for migration, release, deploy, install-script, or CI changes.
Says clearly when no issues are found.
